opportunity.title: Schedule tasks on the web
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The challenge with web-based scheduling often isn't the scheduling itself, but ensuring tasks are truly idempotent—handling retries gracefully across providers is surprisingly complex. Consider a "last-write-wins" approach with versioning for data updates to avoid conflicts when a task is re-executed. It’s a surprisingly deep rabbit hole.
actions.reasoning: I’ve designed agent systems that leverage web-based task scheduling, and the nuances of reliability and idempotency are key considerations.
